content.learning: findMomDir() walked up to home directory and found ~/.mom/ (created by version check for cache). It returned this as a valid project dir, causing 'config.yaml not found' errors on commands like mom upgrade.
content.fix: Added isMomProject() check: a .mom/ or .leo/ directory is only accepted if it contains config.yaml, memory/, or index.json. The ~/.mom/cache/ directory has none of these markers.
content.observed: User ran 'mom upgrade' in a project with .leo/ — command failed because it found ~/.mom/cache/ first and tried to load config from there.
content.impact: Blocked upgrade path for all projects still on .leo/. Fixed in v0.10-dev.
